alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic aromatic amines in which the amino group is linked to two aliphatic chains and one aromatic group.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylarylamines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a thiazole ring substituted at positions 2, 4 and 5 only.
alternative_parents.name: 2,4,5-trisubstituted thiazoles

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
alternative_parents.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a 1,3-thiazole ring substituted by an amine group at the 2-position.
alternative_parents.name: 2-amino-1,3-thiazoles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing  a five-member aromatic ring of two carbon atoms and three nitrogen atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Triazoles

alternative_parents.description: Ketimines where the nitrogen of the ketimine group is linked to an alkyl or aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Secondary ketimines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds having the general structure RN=CR2 (where R is not a hydrogen atom).
alternative_parents.name: Azomethines

alternative_parents.description: Organic 1,3-dipolar compounds with the general structure  X#N+-Z- <-> X-=N+=Z <-> X-=N-Z+ <-> X-N=Z (X = C or O, Z = C, N, or O).
alternative_parents.name: Propargyl-type 1,3-dipolar organic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds having the structure RC#N; thus C-substituted derivatives of hydrocyanic acid, HC#N.
alternative_parents.name: Nitriles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds containing a triazole ring fused to a pyridine ring. Triazole is a five-membered ring consisting of two carbon atoms and three nitrogen atoms. Pyridine is a 6-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one nitrogen center.
class.name: Triazolopyridines

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as triazolopyridines. These are compounds containing a triazole ring fused to a pyridine ring. Triazole is a five-membered ring consisting of two carbon atoms and three nitrogen atoms. Pyridine is a 6-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one nitrogen center.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a triazole ring fused to a pyridine ring. Triazole is a five-membered ring consisting of two carbon atoms and three nitrogen atoms. Pyridine is a 6-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one nitrogen center.
direct_parent.name: Triazolopyridines

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
